name: Hierarchical Annotation
short_description: Decompose benchmark tasks into a three-level hierarchy and label gold actions at each level.
detailed_description: Tasks of this type produce hierarchical annotations of benchmark problems with gold actions at the global-planning, subtask-planning, and atomic-execution levels. The work combines manual review with LLM-assisted suggestion, validates an annotation schema, and outputs a dataset asset whose rows feed Phase 2 and Phase 3 scope-conditioning experiments. This type is distinct from data-analysis because it produces new labelled assets rather than analysing existing ones, and from download-dataset because the gold-action labels do not exist before the task runs.
